title: Successful account creation with valid email and password
description: User creates an account using a unique email and a password that meets the minimum and maximum length requirements (e.g., 12 characters). The account is created successfully.

title: Account creation with missing email
description: User attempts to create an account without providing an email. The system should reject the request and indicate that email is required.

title: Account creation with missing password
description: User attempts to create an account without providing a password. The system should reject the request and indicate that password is required.

title: Account creation with duplicate email
description: User attempts to create an account using an email that already exists in the system. The system should reject the request due to email uniqueness rule.

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters
description: User creates an account with a password of exactly 8 characters. The account should be created successfully as it meets the minimum length requirement.

title: Account creation with password exactly 50 characters
description: User creates an account with a password of exactly 50 characters. The account should be created successfully as it meets the maximum length requirement.

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters
description: User attempts to create an account with a password of 7 characters. The system should reject the request as it is below the minimum length of 8 characters.

title: Account creation with password of 51 characters
description: User attempts to create an account with a password of 51 characters. The system should reject the request as it exceeds the maximum length of 50 characters.

title: Login attempt before email verification
description: User creates an account but does not verify their email. The user attempts to log in. The system should prevent login until the email is verified.

title: Login attempt after successful email verification
description: User creates an account, verifies their email within 24 hours, and then attempts to log in. The system should allow login.

title: Login attempt with expired verification link
description: User creates an account but does not verify their email within 24 hours. The verification link expires. The user attempts to log in. The system should prevent login due to unverified email.
